posts.raw_content:
Anti-Muzzie Spray Bottle

__________

Ingredients:

1 cup water
2–3 tablespoons unsalted pork drippings or pork broth (strained)
Optional: 1 teaspoon unflavored gelatin to help the scent cling to surfaces

Instructions:

Warm the water.
Stir in the pork broth or drippings until well mixed.
If using gelatin, dissolve it completely while the mixture is warm.
Let it cool.
Strain through a fine mesh or coffee filter so it won't clog the spray nozzle.
Pour into a clean spray bottle.

Storage:

Keep refrigerated.
Use within 2–3 days, since it contains meat products.
Shake before each use.

___________

If this can become a thing all across America, some people who hate America may get the idea to go home.

________

Some forms of passive aggression can be effective.
